name: Pizza Mexicana
recipeIngredient: 1 can Sliced black olives, drained - 2-1/4 oz. can
recipeInstructions:
1. Evenly spread beans over top of pizza/bread crust.
2. Top with remaining ingredients in order given, EXCEPT tomato and cilantro.
3. Bake at 450-degrees F for 15 minutes or until cheese is melted.
4. Top with tomatoes and cilantro.
5. Makes 4 servings. Additional toppings: sour cream, diced green onions, guacamole and Rosarita salsa.
